name: maieutic
description: Read-only Socratic codebase teaching with agent-controlled visual focus.

languageModelTools.name: maieutic_focus_content
languageModelTools.userDescription: Open and visually focus a section of a workspace file.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Opens a workspace file, scrolls the complete requested line range into view, and visually focuses that section. Use this before pointAtContent when explaining or directing attention to editor content. A new focus replaces the prior focus and clears its pointer. This tool does not return or edit file content and does not replace the explanation in your response.

path.description: Workspace-relative file path. In a multi-root workspace, prefix an ambiguous path with the workspace folder name.

endLine.description: Last focused line, inclusive. Defaults to startLine.

languageModelTools.name: maieutic_point_at_content
languageModelTools.userDescription: Move or clear the visual pointer within the current focused section.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Moves the visual pointer to one exact token or span inside the current focused section without reopening the file, changing the focused block, or scrolling. Use action 'point' while discussing a specific detail and action 'clear' when the block should remain focused without a precise pointer. Call focusContent first. Prefer pointerText when it is unambiguous; otherwise use explicit 1-based line and column coordinates.

action.description: Whether to move or clear the precise pointer while preserving the focused block.

pointerText.description: Exact text to point at within the focused lines.

pointerOccurrence.description: 1-based occurrence of pointerText within the focused lines. Defaults to 1.

pointerLine.description: Exact pointer line, using 1-based document coordinates.

pointerStartColumn.description: Exact pointer start column, using 1-based coordinates.

pointerEndColumn.description: Exact pointer end column, exclusive and 1-based.

languageModelTools.name: maieutic_clear_focus_content
languageModelTools.userDescription: Remove the focused section and precise pointer.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Clears the complete visual presentation, including both the focused section and any precise pointer. Use this when visual focus is no longer useful or before ending a walkthrough.

scripts.check: npm run check:types && npm run lint && npm run test:unit
scripts.test: npm run package && npm run compile:test && vscode-test
